task_name: Implement Local Builder Task Create Readiness Candidate Mock
goal: Implement a local deterministic Builder Task Create Readiness Candidate mock that consumes the BP-067 handoff envelope and emits a local readiness output without creating tasks or calling Builder.
claims: BP-068 implements a local Builder Task Create Readiness Candidate mock from the BP-067 handoff envelope.
BP-068 blocks task creation, execution, live Builder calls, adapter configuration, auth, secrets, persistence, and approval recording.
BP-068 does not call Builder, create tasks, execute tasks, configure auth, use secrets, use DB, persist data, or record approval.
assumptions: The BP-067 contract is the source of truth for Builder Task Create readiness input and output envelopes.
The first task-create readiness implementation should be local and fixture-reviewed before any Builder adapter is connected.
Builder Task Create remains blocked after BP-068.
dod: examples/builder-task-create-readiness-candidate contains golden input/output fixtures for prepared, review, and blocked cases.
tools/test-builder-task-create-readiness-candidate-fixtures.cjs compares CLI output against golden fixtures.
stop_conditions: Builder Task Create, live Builder access, adapter configuration, Auth, secrets, persistence, approval recording, Execute, Approve, Push, Deploy, or DB becomes necessary
Builder Task Create Readiness mock needs to write target files instead of only returning an envelope
prior_task_findings: BP-067 defined a document-only Builder Task Create Readiness Contract and named a local candidate mock with fixtures as the next safe step.
